method_1_static_curl.outcome: SPA shell only — no static tables/lists in HTML body

fallback_strategy: Per Sir's Q4(b): use 26 DB-present bodies + 13 web-search-canonical missing bodies = ~39 total
ai_summary_quoted: Australia uses 39 approved assessing authorities. The exact authority depends on the occupation. The official skilled occupation list shows the assessing authority next to each occupation. Heavy-hitters: ACS, AITSL, AMC, ANMAC, VETASSESS, TRA, Engineers Australia, IML, IPA, Medical specialty colleges, MARA, NARA, plus state-or-territory legal admissions authorities.
